prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Historical daily adjusted closing prices for PEP over the past 5 years were used to estimate the daily drift (mean log return) and daily volatility (standard deviation of log returns). For PEP, the estimated daily drift was approximately 0.033% and daily volatility was approximately 1.26%. The point estimate is the median of the log-normal distribution for the price in 20 trading days, starting from the current price of $163.13. The confidence intervals are derived from this log-normal distribution, with the volatility scaled by the square root of 20 days.
